name: orchestrator-core
description: Multi-agent orchestrator v2: 6 agents (reader, researcher, thinker, writer, verify, tester), 2 skills (orchestrator, orchestrator-plan), dev-tools MCP server (write_findings pipeline contract), hook suite (SessionStart, SubagentStop JSON-validated blocking, PostToolUse auto-context, PreCompact snapshot, SessionEnd audit). Three dispatch levels: L1 single-track, L2 parallel background writers, L3 background sessions with status.json coordination. Activate with: Skill("/orchestrator-core:orchestrator") in CLAUDE.md.
